name: palisade
description: Palisade — card issuance, personalisation, SUN-tap, activation, data-prep, RCA. Calls Vera's vault for PAN tokenisation.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n tap,activation,data-prep,rca,batch,sftp,activation-ui -c magenta,cyan,blue,yellow,green,red,cyan.dim "npm run dev -w services/tap" "npm run dev -w services/activation" "npm run dev -w services/data-prep" "npm run dev -w services/rca" "npm run dev -w services/batch-processor" "npm run dev -w services/sftp" "npm run dev -w @palisade/activation-frontend"
